sections.paragraph:
Original: חמּון

Transliteration: chammôn

Phonetic: kham-mone'

BDB Definition:

Hammon = "warm springs"
  1. a town in Asher, apparently not far from Zidon-rabbah
  2. a town in Naphtali allotted to the Levites; also called 'Hammath' and 'Hammoth-dor'

Origin: from H2552

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
